name: Sizzling Pork Pockets
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces boneless pork loin, cut into thin strips
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, combine the Dijon mustard, lemon juice, chicken broth, finely chopped garlic, and black pepper.
2. Add the pork strips to the bowl and toss to ensure they are evenly coated with the marinade mixture.
3. Cover the bowl with plastic wrap and refrigerate for 15-20 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
4. Remove the meat from the bowl using a slotted spoon, being careful not to splash any of the marinade.
5. Discard the marinade.
6. Heat a large non-stick skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
7. Stir-fry the pork for 5 minutes or until it is cooked through and reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
8. Open the pita breads to form a pocket and fill each with an even amount of mixed lettuce and cooked pork strips.
9. Optionally, top each pocket with a tablespoon of tarragon dressing for added flavor.
10. Serve immediately and enjoy your delicious Sizzling Pork Pockets!
